data.body: DECISION (per maintainer): ADOPT as a documented, reachable preflight. De-DSO'd the strings (docstring, 'dso bridge use case' comment, 'DSO capability probe' issue title -> rebar). Made it reachable via a new dispatcher arm 'rebar bridge-probe' (routes to jira-capability-probe.py; no tracker init needed — talks only to Jira). Added help overview + usage entries and documented it in docs/releasing.md as the optional live-Jira capability preflight. Its existing test (tests/scripts/test_jira_capability_probe.py) still passes; help-coverage + CLI/surface interface tests green.
